digital_rain.h(3) Library Functions Manual digital_rain.h(3)

NAME

digital_rain.h - Matrix-style digital rain effect for ASCII frames.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct digital_rain_column_t
Digital rain column state. struct digital_rain_t
Digital rain effect context.

Macros


#define DIGITAL_RAIN_DEFAULT_FALL_SPEED 3.0f
Default fall speed for raindrops. #define DIGITAL_RAIN_DEFAULT_RAINDROP_LENGTH 12.0f
Default raindrop length. #define DIGITAL_RAIN_DEFAULT_BRIGHTNESS_DECAY 0.1f
Default brightness decay factor. #define DIGITAL_RAIN_DEFAULT_ANIMATION_SPEED 1.0f
Default animation speed multiplier. #define DIGITAL_RAIN_DEFAULT_COLOR_R 0
Default Matrix green color (R, G, B). #define DIGITAL_RAIN_DEFAULT_COLOR_G 255
#define DIGITAL_RAIN_DEFAULT_COLOR_B 80
#define DIGITAL_RAIN_DEFAULT_CURSOR_BRIGHTNESS 2.0f
Cursor brightness multiplier.

Functions


digital_rain_t * digital_rain_init (int num_columns, int num_rows)
Initialize digital rain effect context. void digital_rain_destroy (digital_rain_t *rain)
Destroy digital rain effect context. char * digital_rain_apply (digital_rain_t *rain, const char *frame, float delta_time)
Apply digital rain effect to ASCII frame. void digital_rain_reset (digital_rain_t *rain)
Reset digital rain effect state. void digital_rain_set_fall_speed (digital_rain_t *rain, float speed)
Set digital rain fall speed. void digital_rain_set_raindrop_length (digital_rain_t *rain, float length)
Set digital rain raindrop length. void digital_rain_set_color (digital_rain_t *rain, uint8_t r, uint8_t g, uint8_t b)
Set digital rain color. void digital_rain_set_color_from_filter (digital_rain_t *rain, color_filter_t filter)
Set digital rain color from color filter.

Detailed Description

Matrix-style digital rain effect for ASCII frames.

Definition in file digital_rain.h.
